AI-powered assistant

Command Center

Settings

Reminder preferences matter early because the assistant should eventually help students stay on top of school without making the app feel noisy.

Reminder Preferences

Configure how and when the assistant nudges you about your schedule and upcoming work.

Current summary

Daily summaries are on at 07:00. Tonight summaries are on at 18:30. Due-soon reminders are on 6 hours before tasks are due.
